cast-a-doc overviewcast-a-doc 概览

Product Boundary产品边界

  • Core job核心任务: Turn structured document JSON into portable, self-contained HTML artifacts.把结构化文档 JSON 转成可携带、自包含的 HTML 产物。
  • Authoring role写作角色: Give coding agents a stable contract for producing engineering documents with predictable layout and validation.给 coding agent 一份稳定契约，用于生成布局和校验都可预期的工程文档。

cast-a-doc is the rendering and document-contract skill in CAST Docs. It should stay focused on JSON shape, reusable document components, local validation, and generated HTML. cast-a-start should own repository onboarding, rewrite strategy, and project planning decisions.cast-a-doc 是 CAST Docs 中负责渲染与文档契约的 skill。它应聚焦 JSON 形态、可复用文档组件、本地校验和 HTML 生成。cast-a-start 应负责仓库启动、重写策略和项目规划决策。

Users用户

User用户Need需求Success signal成功信号
Coding agentCoding agentA compact source format and renderer that can be used without extra packages.无需额外依赖即可使用的紧凑源格式和渲染器。JSON validates and HTML renders deterministically.JSON 可校验，HTML 可确定性渲染。
Maintainer维护者Stable examples, fixtures, and tests when changing the renderer.修改渲染器时有稳定示例、fixture 和测试。Fixture checks catch behavior drift.fixture 检查能捕捉行为漂移。
Reader读者A readable artifact that works from a browser, email attachment, archive, or Pages site.能在浏览器、邮件附件、归档或 Pages 站点中阅读的产物。No local setup is needed to view the document.查看文档不需要本地配置。

Current State当前状态

  • The renderer is implemented in Python and uses only the standard library.渲染器由 Python 实现，并且只使用标准库。
  • The schema controls metadata, manifest, sections, localized text, and reusable blocks.schema 控制 metadata、manifest、sections、多语言文本和可复用 block。
  • Examples and generated HTML pages double as fixture coverage and public documentation.示例与生成 HTML 同时承担 fixture 覆盖和公开文档角色。
  • The project profile under .cast-docs records repository-level defaults for output paths, writing style, templates, assets, and standardized style profiles..cast-docs 下的 project profile 记录输出路径、写作风格、模板、资源和标准化样式配置等仓库级默认值。

Non-Goals非目标

Keep the renderer boring让渲染器保持朴素

cast-a-doc should not become a web app, a markdown dialect, a live collaboration platform, or a hidden agent memory system.cast-a-doc 不应变成 Web 应用、Markdown 方言、实时协作平台或隐藏 agent 记忆系统。

  • Do not require external CDNs or runtime JavaScript frameworks.不要求外部 CDN 或运行时 JavaScript 框架。
  • Do not silently overwrite repository documents during a rewrite.重写时不静默覆盖仓库文档。
  • Do not move project planning responsibility out of cast-a-start.不把项目规划职责从 cast-a-start 挪走。
